description: Style NoteThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this top, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel, throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, tights and a floral scarf with this piece. Product detailsPink top, has capped sleeves, round neck, stitched details along the front, smocked waistband and a box pleat from the waist running vertically down to the hemMaterial and Care 100% cottonRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model( height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
